_comment: Generic template — copy to config/clients/<client_slug>/run_config.json and fill in client-specific values. Run with: python pipeline.py --config config/clients/<client_slug>/run_config.json --icp config/clients/<client_slug>/icp_checklist.json
_comment_verify_near_miss_band: Optional. Points below bullseye_min_score to ALSO send to GPT verification, catching strong targets that scored just under the line. 0 = disabled (verify Bullseye only). Example: 10 verifies records scoring 80-89 as well. Adds GPT spend when > 0.
_comment_evidence_capture_enabled: Evidence Vault: archive per-page crawled text (timestamp + sha256) under <run>/evidence/ so signal claims stay verifiable after the live site changes. Adds a few MB per run. Set false to disable.
_comment_drive_sync: Optional. Sync the output directory to Google Drive after each run using rclone. Run scripts/setup_drive_sync.sh once per machine to install rclone and authorize Drive access.
